description: A pen and ink drawing with wash showing a scene in a colonnaded Roman hall with three large arches. At left, three young men in short tunics stride forward with arms outstretched toward an older man at center who holds three swords aloft. At right, a group of women and children slump together in grief. The drawing is precise and classical in composition, with strong architectural lines framing the dramatic human action.

_meta.title: The Oath of the Horatii, according to David
